reviews.review_description: Not a bad game took me by surprise
Game has no 3D depth at all!? Not a vr game!

reviews.review_title: One of the best space shooter
reviews.review_description: Great game! Good controls having thé booster ability le a blast! I recomend this game as it is very challenging! Only negative point:  the F.o.v maybe a little too narrow. A Larger F.o.v would give a wider panorama view in cockpit and would enhance. immersion. Great game love it!

Don't be fooled by the lukewarm reviews,  this game rocks. I read the issue other players had with 3D depth, but this is only present in the brief tutorial. This is a challenging Wing Commander-style game, a nice change of pace from other hand holding VR games and worth double the price

So its a bummer to see so much shovelware poo that it buries real gems like this its a flawed system anyways AMAZING game  guys its 3$ i cant buy 2 pops for that no clue what ppl mean by its not 3D maybe that was a previous copy this is fully 3d so plz drop the 2.99 and realize end space isnt the only quality apace shooter i doubt devs will read this but my only complaint is the cockpit is massive can u scale that down?? LolL but the games a 5 all day long update still loving it but is there a "not impossible" mode i wonder? LoL ....update still fun still tough as balls lol
